For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims after August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from the date of last activity. ; Paper: For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims prior to August 25, 2006 shall be disposed of ten (10) years from the date of last activity. For "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims after August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from the date of last activity.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain in active files until employee separation, six years from the date of action taken and/or the latter of the expiration of a statutory period within which an aggrieved person may bring an action in the United States District Court.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain lost and unclaimed property a minimum of 30 days. After 30 days minimum, unclaimed personal property of more than de minimis value or having intrinsic value is donated to a designated charity. Any unclaimed cash is sent to the CFO/Comptroller''s office.

series_description: Records of recovered property lost on the Ohio Turnpike.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years from date of disposition. ; Paper: Retain 2 years from date of disposition.

series_description: Information pertaining to disputes, hearings, or appeals. This includes evidence package, hearing decision, and appeal file. Dispute(s) regarding possible inaccurate toll transactions ( i.e., reclassifications of vehicle class, extended time on the Ohio Turnpike, authorized U-turns, credit card disputes, adjusted maximum fare toll tickets, stolen, other written requests, incorrectly identified license plate, or "not my vehicle").
